message:
Finalize fixes for runtime, transport, and synchronization bugs

- Fix TcpStream::set_keepalive by accessing inner stream through Arc
- Fix RwLock writer starvation test by adding retry loop
- Fix SendAllFuture missing field
- Fix moved value usage in Sink implementation
- Fix ambiguous numeric type in Stream
- Restore correct DetRng::shuffle implementation
- Fix doc comments and visibility in utility modules
- Include new resource utility module
- Verify all 1163 tests pass
